title: Toothbrush Marker by CUPmarker - Set of 6 Reusable & Adjustable Toothbrush Labels for Standard Toothbrushes

reviews.title: Worked for my purpose
reviews.text: My husband and I share an electric toothbrush and usually the toothbrush heads come with different colors but sometimes we get stuck with all the same ones so I wanted something else to mark them. They were a little small to fit on the oral b toothbrush head but I managed to get them on.

title: BASHUO Kids Ultrasonic Electric Toothbrush, 6 Gear Speed Mode IPX7 for Sensitive Teeth 360° Oral Cleaning U Shaped Toothbrush for Children Toddler 2-7 Years Old (Pink)
features: 【KIDS ELECTRIC TOOTHBRUSH】U-Shaped Toothbrush for Kids adopts a cute cartoon design, has 6 different tooth brushing modes, scientifically shakes for 45 seconds, and protects the dental health of children aged 2-7. The silicone head design allows children to develop the correct way of brushing without manual adjustment, making brushing a habit for children and enjoying the fun of brushing.

【45° Ultrasonic Toothbrushes】The professional scientific design of kids electric toothbrush,We have passed tens of thousands of simulated dental cleaning tests: 45° brushing with LED cold blue light low-frequency wave cleaning, 45 seconds of smart scientific timing to care for the toddler's teeth. The Technique is safe to protect oral health by redox reaction with pigment.

【MULTIFUNCTIONAL MODES】Six different smart cleaning modes，Which can satisfy that all teeth are covered, sound waves clean teeth 5000-15000 times/min, different frequencies, diverse and powerful, care for oral health, clean stubborn tooth stains, whiten teeth, also suitable for sensitive gums, and promote around the gums Gum blood circulation. It is equipped with 400mAh battery, It can be used for 400 hours each time with USB charging once every half month. Perfect for daily use and travel.

【IPX7 waterproof】With IPX7 professional waterproof technology,Toddler can brush their teeth while bathing. USAGE TIPS - This toothbrush should be used with foam toothpaste. When brushing your teeth, please move left and right while adjusting the up and down angle to achieve the best cleaning effect. Replace the brushing head every 2-3 months to Keep the brush head in good condition. Keep the toothbrush body dry while charging and its working time should be less than 10 mins.

reviews.title: Great for little boys who don’t brush well
reviews.text: My son is horrible at brushing his teeth. He does it often, just has a hard time getting every crevice. He shakes this around back and fourth while in his mouth and gets them nice and clean. 10/10 would recommend.

features: Recharge Your Smile!

Removes stains

reviews.title: I am one of those people that can't stand the ...
reviews.text: I am one of those people that can't stand the feel of soft bristled toothbrushes.  I am therefore stuck looking all over to find one of the medium bristled ones.  I have finally found one that feels right and leaves my teeth feeling clean without making my gums bleed.

reviews.title: Clean away
reviews.text: brushes my teeth every day. deserves 5*

reviews.title: Good delivery but poore choice by the packager
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. I often use this brand and style it holds up very well, however I did not like the fact that they sent a guy a pink toothbrush.

reviews.title: Very good travel toothbrush when your sonic is at home.
reviews.text: or when the rest of the family is asleep and you don't want the noisy electric brush to wake them up. The thick handle and light weight is ideal for the elderly or those with arthritis making a tight grip harder to do. I like the medium brush better than the soft bristle, with the medium you don't have to brush as hard for clean teeth and as long as you aren't grinding the bristles into your mouth your gums should not become stressed. With the soft bristle, while ideal for gums, my teeth don't feel as clean.

reviews.title: Polishing star takes some getting used to
reviews.text:
I'm not sure the polishing star is really more effective than normal bristles if you do a good job of brushinganyway, and it is a but squeaky on my teeth and can rub the gums the wrong way if you are careless in brushing.

That said, the medium bristles are effective and not too hard, and I did like the head size, handle grip and overall effectiveness.

title: Colgate Total 360 4 Zone Whole Mouth Clean Manual Toothbrush, Medium
description: Colgate Total 360 4 Zone Whole Mouth Clean Manual Toothbrush, Medium

reviews.title: I really like this tooth brush
reviews.text:
I personally like a firm/hard bristled brush, but they don't seem to be available any longer. I ordered this "medium" 4-zone Colgate brush and found it to be very effective, and as close to firm as your going to get. Also, I really like the back of the brush, as it has an effective tongue cleaning pad that works well and feels great. I am now going to order some more of these while they're available.... I really like this tooth brush!
Note: This is a three pack, which is not in the bold description, but listed in the smaller font.

title: ToiletTree Products Pocket Size Travel Sonic Toothbrush
description: Use ToiletTree Products Pocket-Size Travel Sonic Toothbrush, a space-saving dental dynamo to help keep your teeth clean and healthy when you’re away from home. Put yourself on the road to better dental health and keep one at your office, in your car, in your purse, or toss one in your backpack. Now you don’t have to leave your home without a way to keep your mouth and teeth feeling and looking great. You’ll have fresh breath, clean teeth, and a dental routine that will have you bragging to your dentist.

Adults and kids alike love the everyday firm and effective cleaning power of this compact dental tool; take this battery-operated sonic toothbrush anywhere; perfect for travel and everyday use on the go

reviews.title: A bit too soft
reviews.text:
I ordered this to replace the disposable Colgate electric toothbrush I use for travel. The Colgate does not have replaceable batteries and is a bit large for my kit, but prevents me from carrying my Sonicare. I was hopeful this would be a good replacement.

It's not quite there. The size is okay, but the bristles are very soft and the motion is very gentle. You won't hurt yourself with it, but it has nothing on the cheap Colgate or expensive Sonicare. The other problem is that the cap doesn't post onto the base. That wouldn't have been hard for them to do.

It is a gentle electric toothbrush, just too gentle for my needs.

reviews.title: I only use this for spending one night in a ...
reviews.text: I only use this for spending one night in a hotel, it works OK for that but don't expect it to be as vigorous as the much larger Phillips Sonicare.

title: oogiebear 360° Toothbrush - Training Toothbrush for Babies. Safe Ultra Soft Silicone Toothbrush with Teddy Bear Baby Gum Relief and Gum Massaging Base. Baby Must Haves. BPA Free
features: MAKES BRUSHING SAFE AND BEAR-ABLE - oogiebear’s adorable and innovative baby toothbrush provides better baby oral care and makes brushing tiny teeth fun with a soft bristle brush and bear head design that ensures it never goes in too deep.

FUN AND FUNCTIONAL DESIGN - oogiebear’s unique 360 degree toothbrush effectively cleans teeth and gums with short soft bristles. The soft silicone base is easy for baby to hold while premium grade silicone bumps stimulate gums.

BABY’S FIRST TOOTHBRUSH - Made for babies 3 months and older, oogiebear toothbrush is the perfect tool to get your baby used to brushing before graduating to their first big-kid toothbrush. Its stand-up base makes it easy to clean and store.

SUPERIOR QUALITY - oogiebear toothbrush is made with the highest quality food-grade silicone. Its extra-soft bristles are fun to chew and won’t break off or cause choking while its base has a silky touch that’s soothing to gums.

DOCTOR DESIGNED, MOM TESTED, PERIODONTIST APPROVED - Created by a registered pharmacist and mother and periodontist dad, oogiebear toothbrush is designed to make learning to brush easier for parents and baby for a lifetime of bright beautiful smiles.

reviews.title: Adorable toothbrush and great teether as well but pricey
reviews.text:
This toothbrush/teether is BPA free and made of soft silicone. The head of the cute bear prevents the toothbrush piece from going too far into the baby's mouth but it is still long enough to act as a teether and also massage the gums. Babies usually do not start getting teeth until about 6 months so it can help the child get used to the first steps of "brushing their teeth." The current price of $12.99 ($15.99 minus $3) is a bit pricey for this.

Always supervise during use and be careful to clean this regularly. Because the brush area is grooved, it is important to give this a vigorous cleaning in that area as food, lint, etc. can get caught in that area depending on where the baby puts it.

reviews.title: Convenient, choke-proof baby toothbrush and teether
reviews.text: The whole thing is designed so that baby can't choke on it no matter which part she puts in her mouth.  The whole 'handle' is bendy silicone, which she also likes as a teether.  The wide bear head makes it easy for her to grab and hold onto it.  The brush is on all sides that you don't have to keep turning it around to get both upper and lower teeth, and still goes in enough to brush her tongue and gums.  It's all about the convenience.

reviews.title: Baby toothbrush
reviews.text: Baby now has two adorable teeth and we just started using this toothbrush before bed every night. Not sure how this is supposed to work because we don’t use toothpaste but he laughs and laughs so we love using it. It’s such a cute part of his bedtime routine and as he gets older he will hopefully have a great association with brushing his teeth and dental hygiene because of this

reviews.title: It was a gift
reviews.text: It was a gift to my nieces son. She said he loves it. He’s only 6 months but it’s never too early to teach. She said he won’t let it go.

reviews.title: Well designed kids toothbrush
reviews.text: Very useful toothbrush. I got it for my 8 month old who already has a few teeth. I love the design. It is relatively large, which makes it easier to my baby to hold and shew in. Since the brush is round, it works from all angles. I highly recommend it.

title: Sonic Electric Toothbrush for Adults - 5 Powerful Cleaning & Whitening Modes with Soft Dupont Bristles, 2 Hours Quick Charge for 60 Days, IPX7 Waterproof Travel Portable Oral Dental Care Kit (Green)
features: 🦷【Smart Sonic Toothbrush】- Our electric toothbrush uses an ultra-powerful and industry-leading motor to drive the liquid between the teeth and deep into the gum line, effectively dissolving stains on the surface of the teeth. Provides superior cleaning by delivering soothing micro-pulses to improve gum health. Removes up to 10 times more plaque than a manual toothbrush, helps whiten teeth.

🦷【5 Modes Ultra Clean】- The sonic toothbrush has 5 vibration modes, clean (mild), white (strong), polish (strong inversion frequency), massage (mild inversion frequency) and sensitive (soft). You can choose stronger or lighter modes according to different oral and gum conditions. Get healthier gums, fresher breath and whiter teeth with this low-noise, lightweight sonic toothbrush.

🦷【Smart Timer Reminder】 - The electric toothbrush has a standard 2-minute brushing timer to ensure scientific brushing time. Pausing every 30 seconds to remind you to change and move on to the next brushing area, the smart toothbrush helps you develop good brushing habits. And the rechargeable toothbrush has an automatic memory function, which can record the mode used when it was turned off last time.

🦷【Large Battery Capacity, IPX7 Waterproof】- The long-life rechargeable toothbrush has a battery indicator light, has a low battery reminder and automatically cuts off the power when fully charged. The large battery capacity can be used for up to 60 days in just 2 hours with fast charging (2 times a day). The IPX7-rated fully sealed charging port is more secure and waterproof, and can be used in bathtubs and showers.

🦷【Gift Box Packaging Included】- Our electric toothbrush comes in a premium gift box packag. Includes 1 Sonic Electric Toothbrush, 2 DuPont Brush Heads, 1 Charging Cable, 1 Travel Case for Electric Toothbrush Handle and Brush Heads. You can also find detailed instructions and a support contact manual. Perfect as a gift for your family and friends.
🦷We provide you with 1 year warranty service. If you have any questions, please contact us first, we will provide you with satisfactory customer service within 24 hours.

reviews.title: Superior Brushing Experience
reviews.text: This electric toothbrush is the best I've ever used. It charged quickly and lasts. It is comfortable in my hands through the entire brushing process. It has average buzzing sound. There are multiple intensities of bruising power for different parts of my mouth. My teeth went from obvious coffee drinker to noticeably whiter and healthier. The bristles are gentle regardless of which setting I used. The narrow head allows me to easily brush my back teeth and gums.

reviews.title: the Artists' (Tooth) Brush
reviews.text:
these tooth brushes are so pretty. the heads are dwarfed by the handles, but the heads are the perfect size for my mouth and the handles are the perfect size for my hands, so no complaints. been using one for the last two days, with charcoal toothpaste and tooth powder. the black bristles make it a bit harder to see when the brush is totally cleaned after brushing, but not so much that it's a problem.

the bristles are great and leave my mouth feeling squeaky clean, but I wish the heads were replaceable because the carved handles are amazing. extremely comfortable, too. I'll definitely start a collection as the bristles die, then (after sawing off the heads) sand them down and use them for something decorative. they're far too pretty to toss in the garbage.

ever since discovering bamboo fabrics a couple of years ago I've been on a bamboo kick for any and everything possible. it's long been one of my favorite plants (and the first thing I planted here at my home), and that it's sustainable/environmentally friendly has made it my go-to. hadn't even considered that there might be toothbrushes made of bamboo, but the minute I saw them I grabbed them. HIGHly recommended. bamboo is the wave of the future!

title: Better & Better Bamboo Sonic Toothbrush for Adults | Rechargeable Electric Toothbrush | Replaceable Bamboo Brush Heads w/Soft, Plant-Based Bristles | 5 Cleaning Modes & Long-Lasting Battery
features: A Cleaner Clean and Brighter, Whiter Smile - Improve your brushing routine with Better & Better’s Bamboo Sonic Toothbrush for adults equipped with soft, natural, plant-based bristles made from castor bean oil. Our sonic toothbrush produces up to 38,000 microvibrations per minute for high polish and gentle clean. Choose from its 5 cleaning modes depending on your brushing needs.

Smart, Seamless & More Powerful Cleaning - Our bamboo electric toothbrush for adults features a 2-minute dentist-recommended timer with 30-second interval pulses. Flaunt your unique smile with the help of the sonic toothbrush's 5 cleaning modes: cleaning (default) for removing plaque, whitening for improving surface color, polishing mode for brightening your front teeth, milder for gentle gum massage, and sensitive for a super gentle mode for sensitive teeth and gums.

A Better Brushing Routine - The bamboo sonic toothbrush’s cleaning modes and plant-based bristles are safe to use on braces and dental restorations (fillings, crowns, veneers, or implants). Our electric toothbrush for adults is certified cruelty-free and comes in recyclable packaging.

Designed for Optimal Brushing Experience - Our bamboo electric sonic brush comes with replaceable bamboo heads. The entire brush is waterproof, so you can use it in the shower. The long-lasting and rechargeable battery also makes this the perfect travel toothbrush to keep your routine tip top on the go. You only need to charge it every 30-40 days when your routine consists of brushing twice, morning and night.

Better for You. Better for the Planet - We set out to make toothbrushes that are good in every way. Our unique natural bamboo brush heads create less waste when replaced. We prioritize the health of our bodies and our planet, which leads us to imagine entirely new ways of doing things. And as we minimize the ecological effects of our products and packaging, we create a better world.

reviews.title: Best toothbrush ever.
reviews.text:
I’ve used Sonicare Diamondclean for years - but after trying this one, I’ll never go back. It’s gentler, cleans better, and less than half the price of Diamondclean. I love the bamboo, the soft bristles. The only thing I wish it had two buttons (one for on/off, one for the settings), and a wireless induction charging base.
But as is I still love it.

reviews.title: Bamboo sonic toothbrush
reviews.text:
Good, sonic (vibrations rather than spinning) toothbrush. I am sure it helps clean better than a manual one, but I would prefer a spinning head for myself. It comes with only 2 replacement heads which deducts a star as I expect at least 4. It does comes with a toothbrush holder stand to recharge with a 30-40 day battery life. Many of these brushes only come with a ubs cable, so the included toothbrush holder is a great addition. Has a 2 minute timer as well as 5 cleaning modes. This toothbrush is unique as it is made with bamboo making it a more natural product!

Amazon will donate to your favorite charity! Use Amazon Smile (smile.amazon.com) when you order and Amazon will donate to the charity of your choice when you make a qualifying purchase. Check out how Amazon Smile works at https://smile.amazon.com/gp/chpf/about/ref=smi_se_rspo_laas_aas. My shopping is donating to my charity of choice; Unravel, at no cost to me! Unravel is a nonprofit organization working to spread knowledge about the grim realities of pediatric cancer and the devastating impact from the lack of funding. All monies raised by and for Unravel will go directly to the fight against pediatric cancer.

title: Curaprox Soft Toothbrush CS 1560, 6 Pack, Colors May Vary
description: The CS 1560 Soft Toothbrush gently fights plaque and stains with the power of CUREN filaments. With densely packed and incredibly gentle bristles, the CS 1560 provides a deeper clean without damaging your gums. Tough on plaque and delicate on gums, the CS 1560 is designed for optimum oral health. The octagonal handle of the CS 1560 delivers precise manipulation to brush at every angle, with an angled brush head removes stubborn plaque and stains in hard-to-reach places. Enamel erosion and receding gum lines can be caused by vigorous scrubbing and hard brushes. To prevent this kind of damage, switch to a softer bristle like the CS 1560. CUREN bristles are gentler than typical nylon brushes for a healthier smile.
features: BRIGHTER SMILE: Transition to a softer brush and deeper clean with the CS 1560, equipped with 1,560 tightly packed 0.15 mm bristles to fight plaque and stay gentle on enamel and gums.
SOFT BRISTLES: By using CUREN filaments instead of nylon, Curaprox toothbrush bristles are incredibly fine and gentle to prevent enamel erosion.
GENTLE ON GUMS: Harsh brushing and stiff bristles can irritate your gum line. The CS 1560 cleans gently to promote gum and oral health.
ANGLED BRUSH: The angled head allows you to remove stubborn plaque and stains in hard to reach places.
STOCK UP: Available in a pack of 6 to stay stocked up year round for a healthier smile.

reviews.title: It's a good toothbrush
reviews.text: It's a good toothbrush. I like that it vibrates every 30 seconds to help you keep track of the time. The brush tips are not too stiff as to be uncomfortable but stiff enough to get the job done.

reviews.title: Surprisingly fantastic!
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:be0e9ab7d6ac2bbe6f1a5308058bc84a]] I have tried other electric toothbrushes but this one exceeded my expectations. My teeth felt clean and I love the built in timers. No more second guessing if you have brushed long enough with this one.

The toothbrush has a great battery life. It took several hours to fully charge but once the light indicator turned from red to green; I haven’t had to charge it again. I have brushed my teeth more than 6 times and the battery is still going strong.

Another great feature is the ability to choose cleaning speeds and (cleaning and whitening) modes with the push of a button. I really enjoyed the high frequency clean mode. When I use this toothbrush, my teeth and tongue feels amazing day and night.

And finally, I was delighted to get 5 refill brush tips. The brush tips have a small profile making it easier to brush my wisdom teeth and the bristles are gentle to my gums. This is a great toothbrush with so many features making it a good value for about $30.

reviews.title: Love this!
reviews.text:
I have no idea how they make a battery last so long! It’s a wonder for sure! I have not needed to charge this thing since I got it, and that was weeks ago.
I love all the color combos that goes with this. There’s black, pink, white… so you can actually blend it in with your bathroom decor.
I opted for the black because our new granite tops are very dark in color.
There are a bunch of attachments that I might never use, but appreciate!
And for this price?! This is an awesome price point. You can’t go wrong with this rechargeable tooth brush.

reviews.title: Best toothbrush
reviews.text: This is my second cybersonic toothbrush.  When my first cybersonic failed after many years of good service I ordered a less expensive name brand electric toothbrush and after 6 weeks threw it away and ordered my new cybersonic. Lesson learned.

reviews.title: Great product
reviews.text:
I've been using Cybersonic for decades. My teeth don't feel clean without it.
My second handle/rechargable battery needed replacing, so I decided to try the Cybersonic 3. I was surprised how much lighter it feels. And I think the oscillation is faster, but I didn't read up on it to check. Same great result - really clean teeth. The timing indicator isn't something I wanted/needed, but doesn't bother me. I has basically ignore it. Hope this handle lasts as long as my previous ones.
I really like the charging base. I discarded the side attachments to hold extra brushes and accessories, which left me with a sleek, minimalistic charging base.
So far I'm really happy with my purchase & highly recommend this product/brand/company.

features: ✅Sterilization Effect 99.9%: Our UV toothbrush sanitizer uses UVC-LED to kill bacteria on your toothbrush to keep your toothbrush clean and maintain good oral health.

✅Built-in Rechargeable Battery: The toothbrush sterilizer case has a built-in rechargeable battery that does not require you to purchase additional batteries. Using the USB-C charging port, it can be fully charged in about 2 hours. A full charge lasts about 15 days.

✅Easy to Use: Put the toothbrush in the toothbrush sanitizer box and close the cover, press the switch to turn on the sterilization for 3 minutes, then the toothbrush cleaner will auto turn off when finished. When sterilization open the cover toothbrush sanitizer UV light auto stop working. Designed with ventilation and drainage port, avoid toothbrushes that become moldy and harbor bacteria in an airtight, humid environment(Shake off the excess water from the toothbrush before putting it in).
✅A Good Gift: The toothbrush sanitizer and holder is made of high-quality ABS material, elegant appearance, using gift box packaging, a good choice for you to give as a gift to relatives and friends.

✅Why StarWin: We sell a wide range of professional high-quality toothbrush sanitizers for home and travel use and offer 2 months free refund and 14 months free replacement, any issues just contact the seller and we will refund or exchange it within 12 hours for you.

title: GO SMILE BLU Foaming Whitening Toothpaste for Blue-Light Toothbrushes, Light Activated Stain Removal & Enamel Whitening Formula to Freshen Breath & Clean Teeth Without Sensitivity, Mint Flavor 2.3 oz
features: Photocatalyst Whitening - Our special formula is a light activated foaming toothpaste that rapidly whitens teeth when paired with GO SMILE BLU blue light toothbrushes. Experience the powerful cleaning of the foaming micro scrubbers while achieving maximum whitening results and stain removal simultaneously.

Advanced Teeth Whitening Formula - Our foaming toothpaste effectively cleans and break up plaque that accrues on teeth, especially after dark liquids like coffee, tea, or red wines. The bubbles penetrate those hard-to-reach places regular toothpaste can't get to.

A Powerful Toothpaste For Professional Results - Remove tough stains and prevent new stains from setting with our specially formula that penetrates teeth for deep whitening and not just surface stains.

Gentle Whitening - Our GO SMILE foaming toothpaste is safe to use on crowns, veneers, and other dental materials. Our toothpaste has been proven to whiten up to 10x better than the leading whitening toothpaste.

Created by a dentist, GO SMILE has been whitening smiles for nearly 20 years. Based in the San Francisco Bay Area, we have revolutionized at-home and on-the-go teeth whitening products that are safe, effective and clinically proven to whiten with no sensitivity. Our products are known for their innovation, ease of use and award-winning results.
